keywords: Skill, diplomacy, address, subtlety
sickness, pain, loss, disaster, snares of enemies
self-confidence, will
the Querent, if male
upright.summary: Skill, diplomacy, address, subtlety; sickness, pain, loss, disaster, snares of enemies; self-confidence, will; the Querent, if male.
upright.summaryModern: You have all the tools and talents you need. Focus your will, trust your skills, and take deliberate action.

keywords: Physician, Magus, mental disease, disgrace, disquiet
reversed.summary: Physician, Magus, mental disease, disgrace, disquiet.
reversed.summaryModern: Your potential is untapped or misused. Beware of manipulation — from others or yourself — and reclaim your power.

keywords: Secrets, mystery, the future as yet unrevealed
the woman who interests the Querent, if male
the Querent herself, if female
silence, tenacity
mystery, wisdom, science
upright.summary: Secrets, mystery, the future as yet unrevealed; the woman who interests the Querent, if male; the Querent herself, if female; silence, tenacity; mystery, wisdom, science.
upright.summaryModern: The answer lies within. Be still, listen to your intuition, and pay attention to what is not being said.

keywords: Passion, moral or physical ardour, conceit, surface knowledge
reversed.summary: Passion, moral or physical ardour, conceit, surface knowledge.
reversed.summaryModern: Secrets or hidden information are at play. You may be ignoring your inner voice — trust what you sense beneath the surface.

keywords: Fruitfulness, action, initiative, length of days
the unknown, clandestine
also difficulty, doubt, ignorance
upright.summary: Fruitfulness, action, initiative, length of days; the unknown, clandestine; also difficulty, doubt, ignorance.
upright.summaryModern: Abundance, nurturing, and creative growth surround you. Connect with nature, beauty, and what brings you comfort.

keywords: Light, truth, the unravelling of involved matters, public rejoicings
according to another reading, vacillation
reversed.summary: Light, truth, the unravelling of involved matters, public rejoicings; according to another reading, vacillation.
reversed.summaryModern: Creative or emotional emptiness may be present. You could be neglecting your own needs or overly dependent on others.

keywords: Stability, power, protection, realization
a great person
aid, reason, conviction
also authority and will
upright.summary: Stability, power, protection, realization; a great person; aid, reason, conviction; also authority and will.
upright.summaryModern: Structure and authority bring stability. Establish clear boundaries, take charge, and build with discipline.

keywords: Benevolence, compassion, credit
also confusion to enemies, obstruction, immaturity
reversed.summary: Benevolence, compassion, credit; also confusion to enemies, obstruction, immaturity.
reversed.summaryModern: Rigidity or lack of control. You may be too domineering — or not disciplined enough.

keywords: Marriage, alliance, captivity, servitude
by another account, mercy and goodness
inspiration
the man to whom the Querent has recourse
upright.summary: Marriage, alliance, captivity, servitude; by another account, mercy and goodness; inspiration; the man to whom the Querent has recourse.
upright.summaryModern: Seek guidance from tradition, mentors, or established knowledge. Sometimes the old ways hold the wisdom you need.

keywords: Society, good understanding, concord, overkindness, weakness
reversed.summary: Society, good understanding, concord, overkindness, weakness.
reversed.summaryModern: Time to question the rules. Blind conformity no longer serves — forge your own understanding.

keywords: Attraction, love, beauty, trials overcome
upright.summary: Attraction, love, beauty, trials overcome.
upright.summaryModern: A meaningful choice or union calls to you. Follow what aligns with your deepest values and authentic self.

keywords: Failure, foolish designs
Another account speaks of marriage frustrated and contrarieties of all kinds
reversed.summary: Failure, foolish designs. Another account speaks of marriage frustrated and contrarieties of all kinds.
reversed.summaryModern: Misalignment or inner conflict. A difficult decision looms — get clear on what you truly value.

keywords: Succour, providence also war, triumph, presumption, vengeance, trouble
upright.summary: Succour, providence also war, triumph, presumption, vengeance, trouble.
upright.summaryModern: Victory through determination. Harness opposing forces within yourself and drive forward with confidence.

keywords: Riot, quarrel, dispute, litigation, defeat
reversed.summary: Riot, quarrel, dispute, litigation, defeat.
reversed.summaryModern: Lack of direction or aggressive force. You may be pushing too hard or losing control.

keywords: Power, energy, action, courage, magnanimity
also complete success and honours
upright.summary: Power, energy, action, courage, magnanimity; also complete success and honours.
upright.summaryModern: True strength is gentle and patient. Meet challenges with compassion, courage, and quiet resilience.

keywords: Despotism, abuse if power, weakness, discord, sometimes even disgrace
reversed.summary: Despotism, abuse if power, weakness, discord, sometimes even disgrace.
reversed.summaryModern: Self-doubt is weakening your resolve. Fear and insecurity are getting the upper hand.

keywords: Prudence, circumspection
also and especially treason, dissimulation, roguery, corruption
upright.summary: Prudence, circumspection; also and especially treason, dissimulation, roguery, corruption.
upright.summaryModern: Withdraw to find inner light. Solitude and introspection lead to the answers you seek.

keywords: Concealment, disguise, policy, fear, unreasoned caution
reversed.summary: Concealment, disguise, policy, fear, unreasoned caution.
reversed.summaryModern: Isolation has gone too far. You may be avoiding connection rather than seeking wisdom.

keywords: Destiny, fortune, success, elevation, luck, felicity
upright.summary: Destiny, fortune, success, elevation, luck, felicity.
upright.summaryModern: The wheel turns. Change is inevitable — embrace the cycle, and know that this too shall pass.

keywords: Increase, abundance, superfluity
reversed.summary: Increase, abundance, superfluity.
reversed.summaryModern: Resisting change only prolongs the struggle. Let go and trust the natural rhythm of life.

keywords: Equity, rightness, probity, executive
triumph of the deserving side in law
upright.summary: Equity, rightness, probity, executive; triumph of the deserving side in law.
upright.summaryModern: Truth and fairness prevail. Your actions have consequences — seek balance and take responsibility.

keywords: Law in all its departments, legal complications, bigotry, bias, excessive severity
reversed.summary: Law in all its departments, legal complications, bigotry, bias, excessive severity.
reversed.summaryModern: Injustice or avoidance of truth. Something is out of balance and needs to be confronted.

keywords: Wisdom, circumspection, discernment, trials, sacrifice, intuition, divination, prophecy
upright.summary: Wisdom, circumspection, discernment, trials, sacrifice, intuition, divination, prophecy.
upright.summaryModern: Pause. A new perspective comes from stillness, not action. Surrender is not defeat — it is wisdom.

keywords: Selfishness, the crowd, body politic
reversed.summary: Selfishness, the crowd, body politic.
reversed.summaryModern: Stalling or resisting the pause. You are fighting the very thing that would free you.

keywords: End, mortality, destruction, corruption also, for a man, the loss of a benefactor for a woman, many contrarieties
for a maid, failure of marriage projects
upright.summary: End, mortality, destruction, corruption also, for a man, the loss of a benefactor for a woman, many contrarieties; for a maid, failure of marriage projects.
upright.summaryModern: An ending clears the way for new life. Let go of what must pass — transformation is already underway.

keywords: Inertia, sleep, lethargy, petrifaction, somnambulism
hope destroyed
reversed.summary: Inertia, sleep, lethargy, petrifaction, somnambulism; hope destroyed.
reversed.summaryModern: Resistance to change creates stagnation. Clinging to what is over will only prolong the pain.

keywords: Economy, moderation, frugality, management, accommodation
upright.summary: Economy, moderation, frugality, management, accommodation.
upright.summaryModern: Find the middle path. Blend opposites with patience, and create harmony through moderation.

keywords: Things connected with churches, religions, sects, the priesthood, sometimes even the priest who will marry the Querent
also disunion, unfortunate combinations, competing interests
reversed.summary: Things connected with churches, religions, sects, the priesthood, sometimes even the priest who will marry the Querent; also disunion, unfortunate combinations, competing interests.
reversed.summaryModern: Imbalance or excess. You have lost your equilibrium — slow down and realign.

keywords: Ravage, violence, vehemence, extraordinary efforts, force, fatality
that which is predestined but is not for this reason evil
upright.summary: Ravage, violence, vehemence, extraordinary efforts, force, fatality; that which is predestined but is not for this reason evil.
upright.summaryModern: Confront what binds you — addiction, materialism, unhealthy attachment. Awareness is the first step to freedom.

keywords: Evil fatality, weakness, pettiness, blindness
reversed.summary: Evil fatality, weakness, pettiness, blindness.
reversed.summaryModern: You are recognizing your chains. The process of breaking free has begun.

keywords: Misery, distress, indigence, adversity, calamity, disgrace, deception, ruin
It is a card in particular of unforeseen catastrophe
upright.summary: Misery, distress, indigence, adversity, calamity, disgrace, deception, ruin. It is a card in particular of unforeseen catastrophe.
upright.summaryModern: A sudden upheaval shatters old structures. From the rubble comes a clearer, more honest foundation.

keywords: According to one account, the same in a lesser degree also oppression, imprisonment, tyranny
reversed.summary: According to one account, the same in a lesser degree also oppression, imprisonment, tyranny.
reversed.summaryModern: You sense disaster looming but resist it. Avoidance will not prevent necessary change.

keywords: Loss, theft, privation, abandonment
another reading says-hope and bright prospects,
upright.summary: Loss, theft, privation, abandonment; another reading says-hope and bright prospects,
upright.summaryModern: Hope shines after hardship. Heal, trust the process, and let inspiration guide you forward.

keywords: Arrogance, haughtiness, impotence
reversed.summary: Arrogance, haughtiness, impotence.
reversed.summaryModern: Hope feels distant. Discouragement clouds your vision — but the light has not gone out.

keywords: Hidden enemies, danger, calumny, darkness, terror, deception, occult forces, error
upright.summary: Hidden enemies, danger, calumny, darkness, terror, deception, occult forces, error.
upright.summaryModern: Not everything is as it seems. Navigate uncertainty by trusting your instincts — the path will reveal itself.

keywords: Instability, inconstancy, silence, lesser degrees of deception and error
reversed.summary: Instability, inconstancy, silence, lesser degrees of deception and error.
reversed.summaryModern: Fear is beginning to lift. Clarity is emerging where there was once confusion.

keywords: Material happiness, fortunate marriage, contentment
upright.summary: Material happiness, fortunate marriage, contentment.
upright.summaryModern: Joy, success, and vitality. This is a time to celebrate life, radiate warmth, and embrace simple happiness.

keywords: The same in a lesser sense
reversed.summary: The same in a lesser sense.
reversed.summaryModern: Your inner light is temporarily dimmed. The joy is still there — you just need to let it in.

keywords: Change of position, renewal, outcome
Another account specifies total loss though lawsuit
upright.summary: Change of position, renewal, outcome. Another account specifies total loss though lawsuit.
upright.summaryModern: A deep inner calling awakens you. Reflect on the past, forgive, and step into your next chapter.

keywords: Weakness, pusillanimity, simplicity
also deliberation, decision, sentence
reversed.summary: Weakness, pusillanimity, simplicity; also deliberation, decision, sentence.
reversed.summaryModern: You are avoiding a necessary self-evaluation. The inner critic is drowning out your true calling.

keywords: Folly, mania, extravagance, intoxication, delirium, frenzy, bewrayment
upright.summary: Folly, mania, extravagance, intoxication, delirium, frenzy, bewrayment.
upright.summaryModern: A fresh start awaits. Step forward with trust and an open mind — not knowing exactly where you'll land is part of the adventure.

keywords: Negligence, absence, distribution, carelessness, apathy, nullity, vanity
reversed.summary: Negligence, absence, distribution, carelessness, apathy, nullity, vanity.
reversed.summaryModern: Caution: recklessness or fear may be at play. You may be avoiding a leap you need to take, or charging ahead without looking.

keywords: Assured success, recompense, voyage, route, emigration, flight, change of place
upright.summary: Assured success, recompense, voyage, route, emigration, flight, change of place.
upright.summaryModern: A cycle reaches its glorious completion. Celebrate how far you have come — you have arrived.

keywords: Inertia, fixity, stagnation, permanence
reversed.summary: Inertia, fixity, stagnation, permanence.
reversed.summaryModern: The finish line is close but something remains incomplete. Take the final step with integrity.

keywords: Dark young man, faithful, a lover, an envoy, a postman
Beside a man, he will bear favourable testimony concerning him
A dangerous rival, if followed by the Page of Cups
Has the chief qualities of his suit
He may signify family intelligence
upright.summary: Dark young man, faithful, a lover, an envoy, a postman. Beside a man, he will bear favourable testimony concerning him. A dangerous rival, if followed by the Page of Cups. Has the chief qualities of his suit. He may signify family intelligence.
upright.summaryModern: A spark of curiosity and enthusiasm. Explore a new idea or project with an open, adventurous spirit.

keywords: Anecdotes, announcements, evil news
Also indecision and the instability which accompanies it
reversed.summary: Anecdotes, announcements, evil news. Also indecision and the instability which accompanies it.
reversed.summaryModern: Hasty action or lack of direction. Enthusiasm without follow-through leads nowhere.

keywords: Departure, absence, flight, emigration
A dark young man, friendly
Change of residence
upright.summary: Departure, absence, flight, emigration. A dark young man, friendly. Change of residence.
upright.summaryModern: Bold, passionate action. Charge toward your goal with energy and confidence — but don't forget to look before you leap.

keywords: Rupture, division, interruption, discord
reversed.summary: Rupture, division, interruption, discord.
reversed.summaryModern: Rashness or burnout. Scattered energy and impulsive decisions lead to unnecessary chaos.

keywords: A dark woman, countrywoman, friendly, chaste, loving, honourable
If the card beside her signifies a man, she is well disposed towards him
if a woman, she is interested in the Querent
Also, love of money, or a certain success in business
upright.summary: A dark woman, countrywoman, friendly, chaste, loving, honourable. If the card beside her signifies a man, she is well disposed towards him; if a woman, she is interested in the Querent. Also, love of money, or a certain success in business.
upright.summaryModern: Lead with warmth, confidence, and determination. Your natural charisma and courage inspire those around you.

keywords: Good, economical, obliging, serviceable
Signifies also--but in certain positions and in the neighbourhood of other cards tending in such directions--opposition, jealousy, even deceit and infidelity
reversed.summary: Good, economical, obliging, serviceable. Signifies also--but in certain positions and in the neighbourhood of other cards tending in such directions--opposition, jealousy, even deceit and infidelity.
reversed.summaryModern: Self-doubt or jealousy dims your fire. Reclaim your confidence before you lose your warmth.

keywords: Dark man, friendly, countryman, generally married, honest and conscientious
The card always signifies honesty, and may mean news concerning an unexpected heritage to fall in before very long
upright.summary: Dark man, friendly, countryman, generally married, honest and conscientious. The card always signifies honesty, and may mean news concerning an unexpected heritage to fall in before very long.
upright.summaryModern: Bold, visionary leadership. You have the courage and clarity to take charge and inspire others toward a shared goal.

keywords: Good, but severe
austere, yet tolerant
reversed.summary: Good, but severe; austere, yet tolerant.
reversed.summaryModern: Arrogance or unrealistic demands. Your ambition has crossed into domination — temper it with humility.

keywords: Creation, invention, enterprise, the powers which result in these
principle, beginning, source
birth, family, origin, and in a sense the virility which is behind them
the starting point of enterprises
according to another account, money, fortune, inheritance
upright.summary: Creation, invention, enterprise, the powers which result in these; principle, beginning, source; birth, family, origin, and in a sense the virility which is behind them; the starting point of enterprises; according to another account, money, fortune, inheritance.
upright.summaryModern: A spark of creative energy or a new beginning. Seize this opportunity with passion and purpose.

keywords: Fall, decadence, ruin, perdition, to perish also a certain clouded joy
reversed.summary: Fall, decadence, ruin, perdition, to perish also a certain clouded joy.
reversed.summaryModern: A false start or blocked inspiration. The spark is there but hasn't caught flame yet.

keywords: Between the alternative readings there is no marriage possible
on the one hand, riches, fortune, magnificence
on the other, physical suffering, disease, chagrin, sadness, mortification
The design gives one suggestion
here is a lord overlooking his dominion and alternately contemplating a globe
it looks like the malady, the mortification, the sadness of Alexander amidst the grandeur of this world's wealth
upright.summary: Between the alternative readings there is no marriage possible; on the one hand, riches, fortune, magnificence; on the other, physical suffering, disease, chagrin, sadness, mortification. The design gives one suggestion; here is a lord overlooking his dominion and alternately contemplating a globe; it looks like the malady, the mortification, the sadness of Alexander amidst the grandeur of this world's wealth.
upright.summaryModern: You stand at a crossroads of possibility. Look ahead, make plans, and prepare to expand your horizons.

keywords: Surprise, wonder, enchantment, emotion, trouble, fear
reversed.summary: Surprise, wonder, enchantment, emotion, trouble, fear.
reversed.summaryModern: Fear of the unknown or poor planning. Restlessness may lead to hasty or ill-considered choices.

keywords: He symbolizes established strength, enterprise, effort, trade, commerce, discovery
those are his ships, bearing his merchandise, which are sailing over the sea
The card also signifies able co-operation in business, as if the successful merchant prince were looking from his side towards yours with a view to help you
upright.summary: He symbolizes established strength, enterprise, effort, trade, commerce, discovery; those are his ships, bearing his merchandise, which are sailing over the sea. The card also signifies able co-operation in business, as if the successful merchant prince were looking from his side towards yours with a view to help you.
upright.summaryModern: Your plans are taking shape. Look ahead with confidence — the horizon holds promise.

keywords: The end of troubles, suspension or cessation of adversity, toil and disappointment
reversed.summary: The end of troubles, suspension or cessation of adversity, toil and disappointment.
reversed.summaryModern: Frustration or delay. Growth is slower than expected — reassess before pushing forward.

keywords: They are for once almost on the surface--country life, haven of refuge, a species of domestic harvest-home, repose, concord, harmony, prosperity, peace, and the perfected work of these
upright.summary: They are for once almost on the surface--country life, haven of refuge, a species of domestic harvest-home, repose, concord, harmony, prosperity, peace, and the perfected work of these.
upright.summaryModern: A time of celebration, harmony, and homecoming. Enjoy the fruits of your labor with loved ones.

keywords: The meaning remains unaltered
it is prosperity, increase, felicity, beauty, embellishment
reversed.summary: The meaning remains unaltered; it is prosperity, increase, felicity, beauty, embellishment.
reversed.summaryModern: Tension at home or an unstable foundation. The celebration feels premature.

keywords: Imitation, as, for example, sham fight, but also the strenuous competition and struggle of the search after riches and fortune
In this sense it connects with the battle of life
Hence some attributions say that it is a card of gold, gain, opulence
upright.summary: Imitation, as, for example, sham fight, but also the strenuous competition and struggle of the search after riches and fortune. In this sense it connects with the battle of life. Hence some attributions say that it is a card of gold, gain, opulence.
upright.summaryModern: Competition and clashing energies. Channel the friction into constructive struggle rather than destructive conflict.

keywords: Litigation, disputes, trickery, contradiction
reversed.summary: Litigation, disputes, trickery, contradiction.
reversed.summaryModern: Avoidance or unresolved conflict. The tension is lingering — address it before it festers.

keywords: The card has been so designed that it can cover several significations
on the surface, it is a victor triumphing, but it is also great news, such as might be carried in state by the King's courier
it is expectation crowned with its own desire, the crown of hope, and so forth
upright.summary: The card has been so designed that it can cover several significations; on the surface, it is a victor triumphing, but it is also great news, such as might be carried in state by the King's courier; it is expectation crowned with its own desire, the crown of hope, and so forth.
upright.summaryModern: Victory and recognition. Your efforts are being seen — accept the praise with grace.

keywords: Apprehension, fear, as of a victorious enemy at the gate
treachery, disloyalty, as of gates being opened to the enemy
also indefinite delay
reversed.summary: Apprehension, fear, as of a victorious enemy at the gate; treachery, disloyalty, as of gates being opened to the enemy; also indefinite delay.
reversed.summaryModern: Recognition eludes you, or ego is getting in the way. Stay grounded whether you win or lose.

keywords: It is a card of valour, for, on the surface, six are attacking one, who has, however, the vantage position
On the intellectual plane, it signifies discussion, wordy strife
in business--negotiations, war of trade, barter, competition
It is further a card of success, for the combatant is on the top and his enemies may be unable to reach him
upright.summary: It is a card of valour, for, on the surface, six are attacking one, who has, however, the vantage position. On the intellectual plane, it signifies discussion, wordy strife; in business--negotiations, war of trade, barter, competition. It is further a card of success, for the combatant is on the top and his enemies may be unable to reach him.
upright.summaryModern: Stand your ground. You are being challenged — defend your position with courage and persistence.

keywords: Perplexity, embarrassments, anxiety
It is also a caution against indecision
reversed.summary: Perplexity, embarrassments, anxiety. It is also a caution against indecision.
reversed.summaryModern: Overwhelmed or ready to give up. The pressure may be too much — consider regrouping.

keywords: Activity in undertakings, the path of such activity, swiftness, as that of an express messenger
great haste, great hope, speed towards an end which promises assured felicity
generally, that which is on the move
also the arrows of love
upright.summary: Activity in undertakings, the path of such activity, swiftness, as that of an express messenger; great haste, great hope, speed towards an end which promises assured felicity; generally, that which is on the move; also the arrows of love.
upright.summaryModern: Rapid progress and forward momentum. Things are moving quickly — stay flexible and ride the wave.

keywords: Arrows of jealousy, internal dispute, stingings of conscience, quarrels
and domestic disputes for persons who are married
reversed.summary: Arrows of jealousy, internal dispute, stingings of conscience, quarrels; and domestic disputes for persons who are married.
reversed.summaryModern: Delays and frustration. The energy has stalled — check for miscommunication.

keywords: The card signifies strength in opposition
If attacked, the person will meet an onslaught boldly
and his build shews, that he may prove a formidable antagonist
With this main significance there are all its possible adjuncts--delay, suspension, adjournment
upright.summary: The card signifies strength in opposition. If attacked, the person will meet an onslaught boldly; and his build shews, that he may prove a formidable antagonist. With this main significance there are all its possible adjuncts--delay, suspension, adjournment.
upright.summaryModern: You are weary but nearly there. One last push — guard your boundaries and see it through.

keywords: Obstacles, adversity, calamity
reversed.summary: Obstacles, adversity, calamity.
reversed.summaryModern: Burnout or paranoia. Exhaustion is making you defensive — rest before the final push.

keywords: A card of many significances, and some of the readings cannot be harmonized
I set aside that which connects it with honour and good faith
The chief meaning is oppression simply, but it is also fortune, gain, any kind of success, and then it is the oppression of these things
It is also a card of false-seeming, disguise, perfidy
The place which the figure is approaching may suffer from the rods that he carries
Success is stultified if the Nine of Swords follows, and if it is a question of a lawsuit, there will be certain loss
upright.summary: A card of many significances, and some of the readings cannot be harmonized. I set aside that which connects it with honour and good faith. The chief meaning is oppression simply, but it is also fortune, gain, any kind of success, and then it is the oppression of these things. It is also a card of false-seeming, disguise, perfidy. The place which the figure is approaching may suffer from the rods that he carries. Success is stultified if the Nine of Swords follows, and if it is a question of a lawsuit, there will be certain loss.
upright.summaryModern: You are carrying too much. The burden is heavy — delegate or drop what is not essential.

keywords: Contrarieties, difficulties, intrigues, and their analogies
reversed.summary: Contrarieties, difficulties, intrigues, and their analogies.
reversed.summaryModern: Release is coming. You are beginning to put down the weight you have been carrying.

keywords: Fair young man, one impelled to render service and with whom the Querent will be connected
a studious youth
news, message
application, reflection, meditation
also these things directed to business
upright.summary: Fair young man, one impelled to render service and with whom the Querent will be connected; a studious youth; news, message; application, reflection, meditation; also these things directed to business.
upright.summaryModern: A gentle invitation to explore your emotions and creativity. Follow your intuition with an open heart.

keywords: Taste, inclination, attachment, seduction, deception, artifice
reversed.summary: Taste, inclination, attachment, seduction, deception, artifice.
reversed.summaryModern: Emotional immaturity or creative block. You may be escaping into fantasy rather than feeling.

keywords: Arrival, approach--sometimes that of a messenger
advances, proposition, demeanour, invitation, incitement
upright.summary: Arrival, approach--sometimes that of a messenger; advances, proposition, demeanour, invitation, incitement.
upright.summaryModern: A romantic or creative invitation arrives. Follow your heart with grace and idealism.

keywords: Trickery, artifice, subtlety, swindling, duplicity, fraud
reversed.summary: Trickery, artifice, subtlety, swindling, duplicity, fraud.
reversed.summaryModern: Jealousy or disappointment. The fantasy is colliding with reality — adjust your expectations.

keywords: Good, fair woman
honest, devoted woman, who will do service to the Querent
loving intelligence, and hence the gift of vision
success, happiness, pleasure
also wisdom, virtue
a perfect spouse and a good mother
upright.summary: Good, fair woman; honest, devoted woman, who will do service to the Querent; loving intelligence, and hence the gift of vision; success, happiness, pleasure; also wisdom, virtue; a perfect spouse and a good mother.
upright.summaryModern: Deep emotional wisdom and compassion. Your empathetic presence heals and nurtures those around you.

keywords: The accounts vary
good woman
otherwise, distinguished woman but one not to be trusted
perverse woman
vice, dishonour, depravity
reversed.summary: The accounts vary; good woman; otherwise, distinguished woman but one not to be trusted; perverse woman; vice, dishonour, depravity.
reversed.summaryModern: Emotional insecurity or martyrdom. Your kindness has turned into self-neglect.

keywords: Fair man, man of business, law, or divinity
responsible, disposed to oblige the Querent
also equity, art and science, including those who profess science, law and art
creative intelligence
upright.summary: Fair man, man of business, law, or divinity; responsible, disposed to oblige the Querent; also equity, art and science, including those who profess science, law and art; creative intelligence.
upright.summaryModern: Emotional maturity and calm authority. You balance heart and mind with wisdom and composure.

keywords: Dishonest, double-dealing man
roguery, exaction, injustice, vice, scandal, pillage, considerable loss
reversed.summary: Dishonest, double-dealing man; roguery, exaction, injustice, vice, scandal, pillage, considerable loss.
reversed.summaryModern: Emotional repression or manipulation. Volatility lurks beneath a controlled surface.

keywords: House of the true heart, joy, content, abode, nourishment, abundance, fertility
Holy Table, felicity hereof
upright.summary: House of the true heart, joy, content, abode, nourishment, abundance, fertility; Holy Table, felicity hereof.
upright.summaryModern: An overflowing of love, joy, and emotional openness. Your heart is full — share it freely.

keywords: House of the false heart, mutation, instability, revolution
reversed.summary: House of the false heart, mutation, instability, revolution.
reversed.summaryModern: Emotional blockage or emptiness. Your heart may feel closed — tend to it gently.

keywords: Love, passion, friendship, affinity, union, concord, sympathy, the interrelation of the sexes, and--as a suggestion apart from all offices of divination--that desire which is not in Nature, but by which Nature is sanctified
upright.summary: Love, passion, friendship, affinity, union, concord, sympathy, the interrelation of the sexes, and--as a suggestion apart from all offices of divination--that desire which is not in Nature, but by which Nature is sanctified.
upright.summaryModern: A deep connection forms — romantic, platonic, or creative. Mutual respect and attraction create harmony.

keywords: Lust, cupidity, jealousy, wish, desire, but the card may also give, says W
, "that desire which is not in nature, but by which nature is sanctified
reversed.summary: Lust, cupidity, jealousy, wish, desire, but the card may also give, says W., "that desire which is not in nature, but by which nature is sanctified."
reversed.summaryModern: Imbalance or separation. The connection is strained — communication is needed.

keywords: The conclusion of any matter in plenty, perfection and merriment
happy issue, victory, fulfilment, solace, healing,
upright.summary: The conclusion of any matter in plenty, perfection and merriment; happy issue, victory, fulfilment, solace, healing,
upright.summaryModern: Celebration, friendship, and joy. Gather with those who lift you up and share your happiness.

keywords: Expedition, dispatch, achievement, end
It signifies also the side of excess in physical enjoyment, and the pleasures of the senses
reversed.summary: Expedition, dispatch, achievement, end. It signifies also the side of excess in physical enjoyment, and the pleasures of the senses.
reversed.summaryModern: Overindulgence or social drama. The merrymaking has gone too far — check your boundaries.

keywords: Weariness, disgust, aversion, imaginary vexations, as if the wine of this world had caused satiety only
another wine, as if a fairy gift, is now offered the wastrel, but he sees no consolation therein
This is also a card of blended pleasure
upright.summary: Weariness, disgust, aversion, imaginary vexations, as if the wine of this world had caused satiety only; another wine, as if a fairy gift, is now offered the wastrel, but he sees no consolation therein. This is also a card of blended pleasure.
upright.summaryModern: Apathy and contemplation. You are dissatisfied with what is offered — but you may be overlooking a real opportunity.

keywords: Novelty, presage, new instruction, new relations
reversed.summary: Novelty, presage, new instruction, new relations.
reversed.summaryModern: A renewed sense of purpose. You are snapping out of your rut and seeing new possibilities.

keywords: A dark, cloaked figure, looking sideways at three prone cups two others stand upright behind him
a bridge is in the background, leading to a small keep or holding
Divanatory Meanings: It is a card of loss, but something remains over
three have been taken, but two are left
it is a card of inheritance, patrimony, transmission, but not corresponding to expectations
with some interpreters it is a card of marriage, but not without bitterness or frustration
upright.summary: A dark, cloaked figure, looking sideways at three prone cups two others stand upright behind him; a bridge is in the background, leading to a small keep or holding. Divanatory Meanings: It is a card of loss, but something remains over; three have been taken, but two are left; it is a card of inheritance, patrimony, transmission, but not corresponding to expectations; with some interpreters it is a card of marriage, but not without bitterness or frustration.
upright.summaryModern: Loss and disappointment. You are focused on what is spilled — but look up; there is still much that remains.

keywords: News, alliances, affinity, consanguinity, ancestry, return, false projects
reversed.summary: News, alliances, affinity, consanguinity, ancestry, return, false projects.
reversed.summaryModern: Healing and acceptance. The grief is beginning to ease — it is time to move forward.

keywords: A card of the past and of memories, looking back, as--for example--on childhood
happiness, enjoyment, but coming rather from the past
things that have vanished
Another reading reverses this, giving new relations, new knowledge, new environment, and then the children are disporting in an unfamiliar precinct
upright.summary: A card of the past and of memories, looking back, as--for example--on childhood; happiness, enjoyment, but coming rather from the past; things that have vanished. Another reading reverses this, giving new relations, new knowledge, new environment, and then the children are disporting in an unfamiliar precinct.
upright.summaryModern: Nostalgia and happy memories. Reconnect with the past — but don't live there.

keywords: The future, renewal, that which will come to pass presently
reversed.summary: The future, renewal, that which will come to pass presently.
reversed.summaryModern: Stuck in the past. The comfort of memory has become a cage — it is time to move on.

keywords: Fairy favours, images of reflection, sentiment, imagination, things seen in the glass of contemplation
some attainment in these degrees, but nothing permanent or substantial is suggested
upright.summary: Fairy favours, images of reflection, sentiment, imagination, things seen in the glass of contemplation; some attainment in these degrees, but nothing permanent or substantial is suggested.
upright.summaryModern: Many tempting options appear — but not all are real. Choose with clarity, not fantasy.

keywords: Desire, will, determination, project
reversed.summary: Desire, will, determination, project.
reversed.summaryModern: Focus and commitment. The haze is clearing — you are ready to choose one real path.

keywords: The card speaks for itself on the surface, but other readings are entirely antithetical--giving joy, mildness, timidity, honour, modesty
In practice, it is usually found that the card shews the decline of a matter, or that a matter which has been thought to be important is really of slight consequence--either for good or evil
upright.summary: The card speaks for itself on the surface, but other readings are entirely antithetical--giving joy, mildness, timidity, honour, modesty. In practice, it is usually found that the card shews the decline of a matter, or that a matter which has been thought to be important is really of slight consequence--either for good or evil.
upright.summaryModern: Walking away from what no longer serves you. A deeper truth calls — follow it, even if it means leaving comfort behind.

keywords: Great joy, happiness, feasting
reversed.summary: Great joy, happiness, feasting.
reversed.summaryModern: Fear of change keeps you stuck. You know you need to leave but cannot bring yourself to do it.

keywords: Concord, contentment, physical bien-être
also victory, success, advantage
satisfaction for the Querent or person for whom the consultation is made
upright.summary: Concord, contentment, physical bien-être; also victory, success, advantage; satisfaction for the Querent or person for whom the consultation is made.
upright.summaryModern: Contentment and wish fulfillment. You have what you wished for — savor it with gratitude.

keywords: Truth, loyalty, liberty
but the readings vary and include mistakes, imperfections, etc
reversed.summary: Truth, loyalty, liberty; but the readings vary and include mistakes, imperfections, etc.
reversed.summaryModern: Inner dissatisfaction despite outer success. Something is still missing — look within.

keywords: Contentment, repose of the entire heart
the perfection of that state
also perfection of human love and friendship
if with several picture-cards, a person who is taking charge of the Querent's interests
also the town, village or country inhabited by the Querent
upright.summary: Contentment, repose of the entire heart; the perfection of that state; also perfection of human love and friendship; if with several picture-cards, a person who is taking charge of the Querent's interests; also the town, village or country inhabited by the Querent.
upright.summaryModern: Emotional fulfillment, lasting happiness, and domestic harmony. This is the heart's true home.

keywords: Repose of the false heart, indignation, violence
reversed.summary: Repose of the false heart, indignation, violence.
reversed.summaryModern: Family tension or unfulfilled dreams. The ideal feels out of reach — address the cracks.

keywords: Application, study, scholarship, reflection another reading says news, messages and the bringer thereof
also rule, management
upright.summary: Application, study, scholarship, reflection another reading says news, messages and the bringer thereof; also rule, management.
upright.summaryModern: A new practical study or project begins. Apply yourself with discipline and curiosity — mastery takes time.

keywords: Prodigality, dissipation, liberality, luxury
unfavourable news
reversed.summary: Prodigality, dissipation, liberality, luxury; unfavourable news.
reversed.summaryModern: Procrastination or lack of commitment. Good intentions are not turning into action.

keywords: Utility, serviceableness, interest, responsibility, rectitude-all on the normal and external plane
upright.summary: Utility, serviceableness, interest, responsibility, rectitude-all on the normal and external plane.
upright.summaryModern: Steady, reliable, methodical progress. Slow and consistent wins the race — trust the process.

keywords: inertia, idleness, repose of that kind, stagnation
also placidity, discouragement, carelessness
reversed.summary: inertia, idleness, repose of that kind, stagnation; also placidity, discouragement, carelessness.
reversed.summaryModern: Stagnation or boredom. The steady pace has become a rut — shake things up.

keywords: Opulence, generosity, magnificence, security, liberty
upright.summary: Opulence, generosity, magnificence, security, liberty.
upright.summaryModern: Practical, nurturing abundance. Create a warm and secure environment with grounded generosity.

keywords: Evil, suspicion, suspense, fear, mistrust
reversed.summary: Evil, suspicion, suspense, fear, mistrust.
reversed.summaryModern: Financial insecurity or overwork. Care for others has come at the cost of caring for yourself.

keywords: Valour, realizing intelligence, business and normal intellectual aptitude, sometimes mathematical gifts and attainments of this kind
success in these paths
upright.summary: Valour, realizing intelligence, business and normal intellectual aptitude, sometimes mathematical gifts and attainments of this kind; success in these paths.
upright.summaryModern: You have built lasting security and success. Lead with generosity, stability, and grounded wisdom.

keywords: Vice, weakness, ugliness, perversity, corruption, peril
reversed.summary: Vice, weakness, ugliness, perversity, corruption, peril.
reversed.summaryModern: Greed or financial mismanagement. Material success has come at a moral or relational cost.

keywords: Perfect contentment, felicity, ecstasy
also speedy intelligence
gold
upright.summary: Perfect contentment, felicity, ecstasy; also speedy intelligence; gold.
upright.summaryModern: A new financial or material opportunity presents itself. A seed has been planted — nurture it with practical effort.

keywords: The evil side of wealth, bad intelligence
also great riches
In any case it shews prosperity, comfortable material conditions, but whether these are of advantage to the possessor will depend on whether the card is reversed or not
reversed.summary: The evil side of wealth, bad intelligence; also great riches. In any case it shews prosperity, comfortable material conditions, but whether these are of advantage to the possessor will depend on whether the card is reversed or not.
reversed.summaryModern: A missed opportunity or unstable foundation. Reassess your plans before investing further.

keywords: On the one hand it is represented as a card of gaiety, recreation and its connexions, which is the subject of the design
but it is read also as news and messages in writing, as obstacles, agitation, trouble, embroilment
upright.summary: On the one hand it is represented as a card of gaiety, recreation and its connexions, which is the subject of the design; but it is read also as news and messages in writing, as obstacles, agitation, trouble, embroilment.
upright.summaryModern: Juggling multiple priorities. Stay flexible and maintain balance — you can handle it, but not forever.

keywords: Enforced gaiety, simulated enjoyment, literal sense, handwriting, composition, letters of exchange
reversed.summary: Enforced gaiety, simulated enjoyment, literal sense, handwriting, composition, letters of exchange.
reversed.summaryModern: Overwhelmed and dropping balls. Prioritize — you cannot do everything at once.

keywords: Métier, trade, skilled labour
usually, however, regarded as a card of nobility, aristocracy, renown, glory
upright.summary: Métier, trade, skilled labour; usually, however, regarded as a card of nobility, aristocracy, renown, glory.
upright.summaryModern: Collaboration and skill-building. Great work happens when you learn from others and contribute your best.

keywords: Mediocrity, in work and otherwise, puerility, pettiness, weakness
reversed.summary: Mediocrity, in work and otherwise, puerility, pettiness, weakness.
reversed.summaryModern: Lack of teamwork or misalignment. The group is not working well together — address the gaps.

keywords: The surety of possessions, cleaving to that which one has, gift, legacy, inheritance
upright.summary: The surety of possessions, cleaving to that which one has, gift, legacy, inheritance.
upright.summaryModern: Holding tight to what you have. Security matters — but don't let fear of loss prevent generosity.

keywords: Suspense, delay, opposition
reversed.summary: Suspense, delay, opposition.
reversed.summaryModern: Greed or material obsession. Your grip is loosening — willingly or not, it is time to share.

keywords: The card foretells material trouble above all, whether in the form illustrated--that is, destitution--or otherwise
For some cartomancists, it is a card of love and lovers-wife, husband, friend, mistress
also concordance, affinities
These alternatives cannot be harmonized
upright.summary: The card foretells material trouble above all, whether in the form illustrated--that is, destitution--or otherwise. For some cartomancists, it is a card of love and lovers-wife, husband, friend, mistress; also concordance, affinities. These alternatives cannot be harmonized.
upright.summaryModern: A time of hardship or feeling left out in the cold. Help is available — do not isolate yourself.

keywords: Disorder, chaos, ruin, discord, profligacy
reversed.summary: Disorder, chaos, ruin, discord, profligacy.
reversed.summaryModern: Recovery from difficult times. Support is arriving — the worst of the material struggle is over.

keywords: Presents, gifts, gratification another account says attention, vigilance now is the accepted time, present prosperity, etc
upright.summary: Presents, gifts, gratification another account says attention, vigilance now is the accepted time, present prosperity, etc.
upright.summaryModern: Generosity and sharing. Give and receive with an open hand — balanced exchange creates harmony.

keywords: Desire, cupidity, envy, jealousy, illusion
reversed.summary: Desire, cupidity, envy, jealousy, illusion.
reversed.summaryModern: Power imbalance or strings attached. Generosity has turned into control or dependency.

keywords: These are exceedingly contradictory
in the main, it is a card of money, business, barter
but one reading gives altercation, quarrels--and another innocence, ingenuity, purgation
upright.summary: These are exceedingly contradictory; in the main, it is a card of money, business, barter; but one reading gives altercation, quarrels--and another innocence, ingenuity, purgation.
upright.summaryModern: Step back and assess your progress. Your investment is growing — patience is required.

keywords: Cause for anxiety regarding money which it may be proposed to lend
reversed.summary: Cause for anxiety regarding money which it may be proposed to lend.
reversed.summaryModern: Impatience or wasted effort. Results are not matching expectations — reconsider this path.

keywords: Work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, skill in craft and business, perhaps in the preparatory stage
upright.summary: Work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, skill in craft and business, perhaps in the preparatory stage.
upright.summaryModern: Diligent work and skill mastery. Focus on your craft with dedication — expertise is built one step at a time.

keywords: Voided ambition, vanity, cupidity, exaction, usury
It may also signify the possession of skill, in the sense of the ingenious mind turned to cunning and intrigue
reversed.summary: Voided ambition, vanity, cupidity, exaction, usury. It may also signify the possession of skill, in the sense of the ingenious mind turned to cunning and intrigue.
reversed.summaryModern: Perfectionism or lack of motivation. Your drive to improve has stalled — find purpose in the process.

keywords: Prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, certitude, discernment
upright.summary: Prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, certitude, discernment.
upright.summaryModern: Abundance and self-sufficiency. You have cultivated a rich, independent life — enjoy it.

keywords: Roguery, deception, voided project, bad faith
reversed.summary: Roguery, deception, voided project, bad faith.
reversed.summaryModern: Financial setback or superficial success. Comfort has come at the cost of genuine connection.

keywords: Gain, riches
family matters, archives, extraction, the abode of a family
upright.summary: Gain, riches; family matters, archives, extraction, the abode of a family.
upright.summaryModern: A lasting legacy of family, tradition, and prosperity. Long-term stability and shared wealth take root.

keywords: Chance, fatality, loss, robbery, games of hazard
sometimes gift, dowry, pension
reversed.summary: Chance, fatality, loss, robbery, games of hazard; sometimes gift, dowry, pension.
reversed.summaryModern: Family conflict or broken legacy. The foundation is cracking — attend to what matters most.

keywords: Authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, examination, and the qualities thereto belonging
upright.summary: Authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, examination, and the qualities thereto belonging.
upright.summaryModern: Curiosity and sharp thinking. Speak up, ask questions, and pursue the truth with intellectual energy.

keywords: More evil side of these qualities
what is unforeseen, unprepared state
sickness is also intimated
reversed.summary: More evil side of these qualities; what is unforeseen, unprepared state; sickness is also intimated.
reversed.summaryModern: Hasty words or gossip. Think before you speak — your words carry more weight than you realize.

keywords: Skill, bravery, capacity, defence, address, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, opposition, resistance, ruin
There is therefore a sense in which the card signifies death, but it carries this meaning only in its proximity to other cards of fatality
upright.summary: Skill, bravery, capacity, defence, address, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, opposition, resistance, ruin. There is therefore a sense in which the card signifies death, but it carries this meaning only in its proximity to other cards of fatality.
upright.summaryModern: Swift, decisive action driven by intellect. Charge forward — but remember to look before you leap.

keywords: Imprudence, incapacity, extravagance
reversed.summary: Imprudence, incapacity, extravagance.
reversed.summaryModern: Scattered focus or aggression. You are moving too fast without a clear direction.

keywords: Widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, privation, separation
upright.summary: Widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, privation, separation.
upright.summaryModern: Clear perception and honest communication. See through the noise and speak your truth with precision.

keywords: Malice, bigotry, artifice, prudery, bale, deceit
reversed.summary: Malice, bigotry, artifice, prudery, bale, deceit.
reversed.summaryModern: Coldness or harsh judgment. Clarity without compassion becomes cruelty.

keywords: Whatsoever arises out of the idea of judgment and all its connexions-power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, offices of the crown, and so forth
upright.summary: Whatsoever arises out of the idea of judgment and all its connexions-power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, offices of the crown, and so forth.
upright.summaryModern: Intellectual authority and ethical clarity. Lead with truth, fairness, and a sharp, principled mind.

keywords: Cruelty, perversity, barbarity, perfidy, evil intention
reversed.summary: Cruelty, perversity, barbarity, perfidy, evil intention.
reversed.summaryModern: Dogmatism or abuse of power. Rigid thinking and cold logic have replaced true wisdom.

keywords: Triumph, the excessive degree in everything, conquest, triumph of force
It is a card of great force, in love as well as in hatred
The crown may carry a much higher significance than comes usually within the sphere of fortune-telling
upright.summary: Triumph, the excessive degree in everything, conquest, triumph of force. It is a card of great force, in love as well as in hatred. The crown may carry a much higher significance than comes usually within the sphere of fortune-telling.
upright.summaryModern: A breakthrough of clarity and truth. Cut through confusion and act with precision and conviction.

keywords: The same, but the results are disastrous
another account says--conception, childbirth, augmentation, multiplicity
reversed.summary: The same, but the results are disastrous; another account says--conception, childbirth, augmentation, multiplicity.
reversed.summaryModern: Confusion or miscommunication. The truth is clouded — seek clarity before acting.

keywords: Conformity and the equipoise which it suggests, courage, friendship, concord in a state of arms
another reading gives tenderness, affection, intimacy
The suggestion of harmony and other favourable readings must be considered in a qualified manner, as Swords generally are not symbolical of beneficent forces in human affairs
upright.summary: Conformity and the equipoise which it suggests, courage, friendship, concord in a state of arms; another reading gives tenderness, affection, intimacy. The suggestion of harmony and other favourable readings must be considered in a qualified manner, as Swords generally are not symbolical of beneficent forces in human affairs.
upright.summaryModern: A difficult decision lies before you. You are avoiding the facts — but choosing is the only way forward.

keywords: Imposture, falsehood, duplicity, disloyalty
reversed.summary: Imposture, falsehood, duplicity, disloyalty.
reversed.summaryModern: Information overload or a no-win situation. The stalemate is breaking — truth is emerging.

keywords: Removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, dispersion, and all that the design signifies naturally, being too simple and obvious to call for specific enumeration
upright.summary: Removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, dispersion, and all that the design signifies naturally, being too simple and obvious to call for specific enumeration.
upright.summaryModern: Heartbreak, grief, or painful truth. Allow yourself to feel the pain — healing begins with acknowledgment.

keywords: Mental alienation, error, loss, distraction, disorder, confusion
reversed.summary: Mental alienation, error, loss, distraction, disorder, confusion.
reversed.summaryModern: Recovery from grief. The worst is passing — forgiveness and healing are becoming possible.

keywords: Vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit's repose, exile, tomb and coffin
It is these last that have suggested the design
upright.summary: Vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit's repose, exile, tomb and coffin. It is these last that have suggested the design.
upright.summaryModern: Rest and recovery. Your mind needs stillness — step back, retreat, and recharge before moving forward.

keywords: Wise administration, circumspection, economy, avarice, precaution, testament
reversed.summary: Wise administration, circumspection, economy, avarice, precaution, testament.
reversed.summaryModern: Restlessness and burnout. You are pushing too hard too soon — the rest you avoided will catch up with you.

keywords: Degradation, destruction, revocation, infamy, dishonour, loss, with the variants and analogues of these
upright.summary: Degradation, destruction, revocation, infamy, dishonour, loss, with the variants and analogues of these.
upright.summaryModern: Conflict and tension. Winning at someone else's cost leaves a bitter taste — choose your battles wisely.

keywords: The same
burial and obsequies
reversed.summary: The same; burial and obsequies.
reversed.summaryModern: Reconciliation or regret. The dust is settling — consider making peace rather than holding a grudge.

keywords: Journey by water, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient
upright.summary: Journey by water, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient.
upright.summaryModern: A journey toward calmer waters. Leave behind what cannot stay and move forward into a more peaceful place.

keywords: Declaration, confession, publicity
one account says that it is a proposal of love
reversed.summary: Declaration, confession, publicity; one account says that it is a proposal of love.
reversed.summaryModern: Stuck in transition. Unresolved emotions are preventing you from crossing to the next shore.

keywords: Design, attempt, wish, hope, confidence
also quarrelling, a plan that may fail, annoyance
The design is uncertain in its import, because the significations are widely at variance with each other
upright.summary: Design, attempt, wish, hope, confidence; also quarrelling, a plan that may fail, annoyance. The design is uncertain in its import, because the significations are widely at variance with each other.
upright.summaryModern: Deception or strategy at play. Not everything is as it seems — be careful who you trust.

keywords: Good advice, counsel, instruction, slander, babbling
reversed.summary: Good advice, counsel, instruction, slander, babbling.
reversed.summaryModern: The truth is coming out. Confession and honesty are the better path now.

keywords: Bad news, violent chagrin, crisis, censure, power in trammels, conflict, calumny
also sickness
upright.summary: Bad news, violent chagrin, crisis, censure, power in trammels, conflict, calumny; also sickness.
upright.summaryModern: You feel trapped — but the prison is in your mind. Change your perspective and you will find the way out.

keywords: Disquiet, difficulty, opposition, accident, treachery
what is unforeseen
fatality
reversed.summary: Disquiet, difficulty, opposition, accident, treachery; what is unforeseen; fatality.
reversed.summaryModern: The blindfold is coming off. You are realizing the limits were self-imposed.

keywords: Death, failure, miscarriage, delay, deception, disappointment, despair
upright.summary: Death, failure, miscarriage, delay, deception, disappointment, despair.
upright.summaryModern: Fear and anxiety fill your mind at night. The worst-case scenario is rarely what actually happens.

keywords: Imprisonment, suspicion, doubt, reasonable fear, shame
reversed.summary: Imprisonment, suspicion, doubt, reasonable fear, shame.
reversed.summaryModern: Recovery from fear. The darkest moment is passing — reach out for support.

keywords: Whatsoever is intimated by the design
also pain, affliction, tears, sadness, desolation
It is not especially a card of violent death
upright.summary: Whatsoever is intimated by the design; also pain, affliction, tears, sadness, desolation. It is not especially a card of violent death.
upright.summaryModern: Rock bottom — but the worst is over. From here, the only direction is up.

keywords: Advantage, profit, success, favour, but none of these are permanent
also power and authority
reversed.summary: Advantage, profit, success, favour, but none of these are permanent; also power and authority.
reversed.summaryModern: Survival and recovery. You are rising from the ashes — the nightmare is ending.
